title: ET13282905 - Executive Assistant (Financial Services)
description:
The Company

Our client, a US MNC within the financial services industry, is looking for an Executive Assistant to support their Country Director.

The Role

The successful incumbent will be entrusted with a variety of administrative and operational responsibilities to ensure the smooth and efficient running of day-to-day activities. This role requires a high level of organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities with a high degree of professionalism. The incumbent will be responsible for:

  • Proactively managing and maintaining a complex calendar for the Country Director, scheduling and coordinating meetings, appointments, and events.
  • Handling the submission, tracking, and reconciliation of expense claims, ensuring adherence to company policies.
  • Organizing and coordinating conferences, meetings, and other events. This includes managing event logistics, coordinating with vendors, preparing materials, and ensuring smooth execution of all event details.
  • Act as a liaison between the Country Director and internal/external stakeholders. Respond to inquiries and relay information on behalf of the Country Director, maintaining confidentiality and professionalism at all times.

Your Profile

You hold a degree in business or any discipline related to secretarial work. You demonstrate excellent organizational and time-management abilities, with a knack for handling multiple tasks simultaneously. Your communication skills, both written and verbal, are strong, and you are proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook). You pay close attention to detail and ensure accuracy when managing sensitive information and documents. With a proactive and adaptable mindset, you excel at building relationships at all organizational levels.

Apply Today

Please send your resume, in WORD format only and quote reference number ET13282905, by clicking the apply button. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

Robert Half International Pte Ltd. Co. Registration no.: 200612189E | | EA Licence no.: 07C5595 | Tan Yee Le (Elise) EA Registration no.: R1330020

By clicking ‘apply’, you give your express consent that Robert Half may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities. For further information on how Robert Half processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the Robert Half privacy notice: https://www.roberthalf.com.sg/privacy-statement. Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status or trade union membership) as we do not collect your sensitive personal data at this time.

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.


Founded in 1948, Robert Half (NYSE symbol: RHI) pioneered specialised recruitment services and today - with more than 325 staffing locations worldwide - Robert Half is the world's leader in placing accounting, finance, banking and technology professionals on a temporary and permanent basis.

In Singapore, Robert Half operates four divisions:

  • Robert Half Finance and Accounting: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent finance and accounting personnel
  • Robert Half Financial Services: Recruitment services for high-calibre financial services, insurance and banking professionals
  • Robert Half Management Resources: Recruitment services for senior-level finance, accounting and business systems professionals on a project and interim basis
  • Robert Half Technology: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent IT professionals

Robert Half also is the parent company of Protiviti®, a global consulting and internal audit firm composed of experts in risk, advisory and transaction services.
postedCompany.name: ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
